evals.prompt: תעשי לי משחק של חיבור על קו מספרים עד 20
evals.expected_output: A structured game design blueprint (NOT an HTML file) that includes: learning objective for addition up to 20 on a number line, rationale for choosing number line as visual anchor, CRA progression plan (concrete objects -> representational dots/jumps -> abstract digits), interaction pattern selection (tap vs drag with reasoning), 3 scaffolding levels with hint fading plan, errorless feedback flow, session structure (5-7 min, 5-7 items), adaptive difficulty rules, and accessibility review for DCD+ASD+MID.

evals.prompt: create a place value game for hundreds, tens and ones - make it fun with dragging blocks
evals.expected_output: A structured game design blueprint that includes: learning objective for place value with base-10 blocks, rationale for choosing drag-and-drop with magnet snap (acknowledging DCD constraints), CRA progression from physical blocks to diagrams to digits, mechanic selection rationale (drag-to-zone with 150%+ hit area), scaffolding plan starting with 2 choices, feedback design with specific Hebrew encouragement phrases, session flow, and accessibility notes about motor demands of drag interaction.

evals.prompt: בתי צריכה לתרגל בעיות מילוליות של חלק-חלק-שלם, תכין לה משחק
evals.expected_output: A structured game design blueprint that includes: learning objective for part-part-whole word problems, rationale for choosing bar model as visual anchor, schema-based problem solving approach, vocabulary card design (ביחד=+, נשאר=−), CRA stages showing how bar model bridges concrete to abstract, interaction pattern (tap-to-select with 2 choices initially), scaffolding with 3-step fixed card approach, Hebrew-specific language considerations (simple sentences, full nikud, one verb per operation), and how to handle the language comprehension challenges of word problems for ASD+MID.
